generated_oml:
instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensing component monitoring the input current of the physical robot, providing real‑time current readings."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTInputCurrentTransmission
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensing component monitoring the output angle of the physical robot, supplying real‑time angular position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTOutputAngleTransmission
]

instance MQTTInputCurrentTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance MQTTOutputAngleTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleSensor
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker acting as the message bus ingesting raw sensor payloads, performing aggregation and preprocessing."
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTDataProcessingService
]

instance VirtualCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Contextual data trace of input current after preprocessing (filtering, unit conversion) and aggregation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTInputCurrentTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance VirtualAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Contextual data trace of output angle after preprocessing and aggregation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTOutputAngleTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance SimulinkRuntimeEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink runtime engine executing simulation models for the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables VirtualTwinSimulationService
]

instance CPPCodeGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ code generator translating models into executable code for real‑time controllers."
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeCompilationService
]

instance JavaCodeGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java code generator translating models into executable code for real‑time controllers."
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeCompilationService
]

instance RobotBehaviourSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state‑machine model detailing the robot's behavioral dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPPCodeGenerator, JavaCodeGenerator
]

instance RobotMontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton model representing component‑connector behaviour of the robot."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPPCodeGenerator, JavaCodeGenerator
]

instance RobotSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Parametric Simulink model built in MathWorks Simulink for numerical simulation of robot dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntimeEngine
]

instance RobotControlSystemCPPModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C++ model of control system for the robot, generated from SysML or MontiArc models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPPCodeGenerator
]

instance RobotControlSystemJavaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Java model of control system for the robot, generated from SysML or MontiArc models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JavaCodeGenerator
]

instance MQTTDataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that processes aggregated and preprocessed MQTT data for the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentHealthInsight, ExecuteCorrectiveAction
]

instance VirtualTwinSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs digital twin simulation models to predict future states."
    DTDFVocab:provides FutureStateInsight, ActionPlanTrajectoryInsight
]

instance CodeCompilationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compiles generated code for deployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeployExecutableAction
]

instance CurrentHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from current data indicating the health status of the robot."
]

instance FutureStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from Simulink simulation predicting future robot states."
]

instance ActionPlanTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing an action plan to adjust the robot's trajectory."
]

instance ExecuteCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to correct deviations detected by the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DeployExecutableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to deploy compiled executable onto real‑time controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "the Digital Twin constellation orchestrates a multi‑notation MBSE environment in which the core functional and logical architecture is modeled in SysML (IBDs, state machines), complemented by component‑connector ADLs such as ACME, AADL, and MontiArc. Simulation and analytics are performed with MathWorks Simulink, enabling the coupling of data traces with dynamic models. Code generation bridges the high‑level models to executable artefacts in C++ or Java, forming a cohesive, model‑driven pipeline that integrates data intermediaries, simulation engines, and runtime components while preserving a shared architectural view."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The twin’s data transfer relies on MQTT to publish the sensor time‑series from the physical plant to the virtual environment. No additional protocols, topology or encoding specifications are provided."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adopts SysML for functional and logical architecture description, and utilizes ACME and AADL as component‑connector ADLs. The digital shadow is formally represented by a UML class diagram as defined in the Digital Shadow reference model. No explicit industry standard compliance, certification framework, or interoperability specification is detailed in the document."
]
